results.name: Costco Wholesale
results.highlightMessage: Headquartered in Issaquah, Washington, Costco is the largest wholesale club operator in the United States, and the third-largest retailer in the U.S.

results.name: Walmart
results.highlightMessage: Headquartered in Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart is a multinational corporation that operates the largest chain of department stores globally.

results.name: McDonald's
results.highlightMessage: McDonald's is the largest chain of fast food restaurants in the world - join us today!

results.name: FedEx
results.highlightMessage: Headquartered in Memphis, US, FedEx is a global delivery service company that has changed the way the world moves packages.

results.name: Target
results.highlightMessage: As a Fortune 50 company with more than 400,000 team members worldwide, Target is an iconic brand and one of America's leading retailers.

results.name: ALDI
results.highlightMessage: We're ALDI, one of the nation’s favorite grocery stores.

results.highlightMessage: At Kroger, we Feed Your Future.
